mpDimByLine.Description: Placing dimensions along a specified line or arc
mpDimByLine.FullDescription: The plugin allows you to place dimensions along a reference line formed by two specified points. The objects to be dimensioned are specified in the working configuration
mpDimByLine.msg4: Specify the center of the circle
mpDimByLine.msg5: Specify the starting point of the arc:
mpDimByLine.msg6: The selected dimension style does not exist in the selected document
mpDimByLine.h4: Search for intersections with blocks based on the outline only
